detail.description: The Judo Home Loan offers the choice of variable or fixed interest rate and tailored repayment options, with a choice of principal and interest or interest only. Only available to business lending customers.
detail.name: Home Loan

eligibility.additionalInfo: Only available to Judo Business Lending customers with Judo Business lending products.

features.additionalInfo: Facility term can be matched to your needs.
Principal and interest, or interest-only repayments. Weekly fortnightly, monthly or quarterly repayment options available on principal and interest loans, to match your cashflow.
Fixed Rate period available for added certainty.
Choice of Variable and Fixed interest Rate.
Unlimited additional repayments are accepted into this product for variable rate facilities, or up to $20,000 of additional repayments per year for Fixed Rate facilities.

fees.name: Other Fees
fees.additionalInfo: Other fees are defined and calculated as part of the business lending application.

lendingRates.additionalInfo: This comparison rate encompasses an Application Fee of $900 and is based on a $500000 loan over 30 years.Other loan setup fees such as valuation fees,property registration fees and stamp duty, have not been included and will be determined upon credit assessment.
